title: update 'buildah images' and 'buildah rmi' commands
body: add more flags to `buildah images` and `buildah rmi`, and write tests

Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
bot, add author to whitelist
bot, test pull request

My most recent addition to this PR should resolve #133

@nalind PTAL
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 6284537) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

Rebasing didn't update my PR.  Do I need to trigger something manually?
Never mind, it seems to have just been delayed
@rhatdan is there a way to manually re-trigger the checks?  It looks like an internal error occurred on the Red Hat CI

@14rcole I usually just do a 
```
git commit -a --amend -s
git push rhatdan --force
```
@nalind you ok with merging?
@14rcole you need to update buildah.md and README.md with these new commands.

@rhatdan The commands were already listed in buildah.md and README.md, and I updated both buildah-images.md and buildah-rmi.md to include the flags I added.  Is there something else in those files that needs to be changed?
Ok Sorry I thought they were missing.

I am going to merge...
